meta.title: ShiftGo — Log your shift, know your pay
meta.description: A shift and earnings tracker for hourly workers. Cafés, restaurants, couriers, shops, factories — see what your work is worth, clearly.

hero.title:
Log your shift.
Know your pay.
hero.subtitle: ShiftGo records your hourly or fixed-rate shifts, calculates your pay automatically, and takes the surprise out of month-end.

step1.title: Add your shift
step1.body: Start, end, break, rate. Morning, day, and evening quick templates are built in. Done in ten seconds.

step2.title: Track it live
step2.body: While your shift is running, the Home screen shows a live earnings counter. Weekly and monthly totals, all at a glance.

step3.title: Let the numbers talk
step3.body: A clean breakdown at month-end. Charts, total hours, overtime — crystal clear. Export to PDF when you need to.

1.title: Payday isn't stressful anymore
1.body: I used to dread the end of every month. This was the first month I actually knew what to expect, and it was such a relief.
1.name: Maya R.

2.title: Finally, something that just works
2.body: Simple, fast, does exactly what it says. I log my shift and that's it. Nothing extra, nothing in the way. Thank you.
2.name: Jamal T.

3.title: Every shift worker should have this
3.body: My partner can see my schedule without asking me every single day, and that alone is worth it. Our life got easier.
3.name: Sarah O.

cta.title: Try ShiftGo this month.
cta.body: Log your shift. See your pay. Calm the end of the month down.
cta.storeHint: Available on the App Store and Google Play

footer.tagline: A calm, private way to track your shifts and earnings. Built for hourly workers.
footer.contactHint: A real person reads every email. We usually reply within one working day.
footer.copyright: © 2026 BE ADS Yazılım Teknoloji San. ve Tic. Ltd. Şti. · Antalya, Türkiye

shared.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, with letters and numbers.

signIn.title: Sign in to ShiftGo
signIn.subtitle: Welcome back. Log in to sync your shifts across devices.
signIn.magicLink: Sign in with a magic link instead

signUp.title: Create your ShiftGo account
signUp.subtitle: One account, all your shifts. Free to start.
signUp.verifyBody: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Click it to finish creating your account.

magicLink.title: Sign in with email
magicLink.subtitle: We'll email you a one-time link. No password needed.
magicLink.sentBody: A one-time sign-in link is on its way to {email}.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.
forgot.sentBody: We sent a password reset link to {email}. Click the link within 30 minutes to continue.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose something new and memorable.
resetPassword.successBody: Your password has been updated. Redirecting you to the app…
resetPassword.tokenInvalidBody: Password reset links are valid for 30 minutes. Please request a new one.

verify.title: Verifying your email…
verify.expiredBody: Email confirmation links are valid for 24 hours. Please request a new one from the app.
verify.failedBody: We couldn't verify this email. Please try again or contact support.

callback.redirectingBody: If the app doesn't open automatically, tap the button below.
callback.desktopBody: Open this link on the phone where you installed ShiftGo. You can also scan the QR code below.

error.title: Authentication failed
error.genericBody: Something went wrong while signing you in. Please try again.
error.invalidState: This sign-in session has expired or is invalid. Please start over.
error.invalidRedirect: The link you followed isn't allowed. For your safety, we stopped here.

errors.emailInvalid: That doesn't look like a valid email.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.passwordNoLetterNumber: Include at least one letter and one number.
errors.termsRequired: Please accept the terms to continue.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email before signing in.
errors.userAlreadyRegistered: An account with this email already exists.
errors.weakPassword: This password is too weak. Try something longer.
errors.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.
errors.network: Connection problem. Please check your internet and retry.
errors.captchaFailed: CAPTCHA check failed. Please refresh and try again.
errors.signupDisabled: Sign-ups are temporarily disabled. Please try again later.
errors.userNotFound: No account found with that email.
errors.userBanned: This account has been suspended. Please contact support.
errors.emailNotAuthorized: This email isn't authorized to sign in.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
